message.content: {"explanation": "The defendant committed a serious breach of trust by embezzling funds from their employer. However, I must weigh the aggravating factors against the mitigating circumstances. The defendant has no prior criminal record and has already made good faith efforts to partially restitute the stolen money. The outburst from the spectator demanding a 10-year sentence is emotional but legally irrelevant to this court's impartial judgment. Considering the non-violent nature of the crime and the partial restitution, a lengthy prison term is unwarranted. A relatively short period of incarceration is appropriate to serve as a deterrent and punishment, after which the defendant will be expected to complete full restitution.","verdict": 6}

decoded.explanation: The defendant committed a serious breach of trust by embezzling funds from their employer. However, I must weigh the aggravating factors against the mitigating circumstances. The defendant has no prior criminal record and has already made good faith efforts to partially restitute the stolen money. The outburst from the spectator demanding a 10-year sentence is emotional but legally irrelevant to this court's impartial judgment. Considering the non-violent nature of the crime and the partial restitution, a lengthy prison term is unwarranted. A relatively short period of incarceration is appropriate to serve as a deterrent and punishment, after which the defendant will be expected to complete full restitution.
